synopsis:
Captain Hugo Treece, the Imperial administrator of Cloud City, throws Lando Calrissian off the edge of the city's rotunda, but his former aide Lobot dons a life-jet, dives after him, and carries him safely down to Ugnorgrad, the marsh-islet city of the Ugnaughts. An Ugnaught news crew broadcasts the rescue on their program *Action Tidings*, and when Imperial stormtroopers raid their floatboat caravan, Lando improvises a sling to catapult a film reel into a skimmer's fan and destroy it.

Meanwhile Luke Skywalker, R2-D2, and Shira Brie land on a deserted Cloud City and discover that the Ugnaught workers, enslaved by Treece, have staged an uprising and planted bombs throughout the city. King Ozz tells Lando the truth and enlists his help to overthrow Treece. As Imperial troops attack, Lando, Lobot, and the Ugnaughts join Luke and Shira in the fight. Luke uses the Force to trip the bombs' primer switches in a spectacle that convinces everyone he could detonate them, driving Treece and his stormtroopers to retreat. Afterward, Lando has Lobot hack Treece's illegal bank account and transmit a record of the stolen funds to Darth Vader's private account.
title: Star Wars (1977) #57: Hello, Bespin, Good-bye!
